Dialogue.speaker: Eye Patch
Dialogue.text: Ugh… supplies are running low in the village. Is there anything we can do?

Dialogue.speaker: Nice Guy
Dialogue.text: Hmm, I’ve heard there’s a kingdom nearby with plenty of wealth… but the journey looks rough.

Dialogue.speaker: Old Man
Dialogue.text: Heh, who’d be foolish enough to risk their life going there?

Dialogue.speaker: You
Dialogue.text: I’ll go, it can't be that bad.

Dialogue.speaker: Old Man
Dialogue.text: Hah… you're a bold one. Or simply just plain stupid.

Dialogue.speaker: Old Man
Dialogue.text: Before you go take this BOW with you.

Dialogue.speaker: You
Dialogue.text: Thanks I'll make sure to make good use of it'

Dialogue.speaker: Nice Guy
Dialogue.text: If you’re really going…. good luck out there.

Dialogue.speaker: You
Dialogue.text: I’ll bring back what we need. Don’t worry it can't be that bad...

Dialogue.speaker: Eye Patch
Dialogue.text: Wait shoudn't we stop him, oh and he's off...
